description: Sanity profile for quick environment validation (not a real attack). Trains the baseline ASCAD CNN for 2 epochs on ASCAD_desync0 with categorical crossentropy. Run with: python exp_baseline_models_run.py --dataset ASCAD_desync0 --model_name ascad_cnn_baseline --loss_function categorical_crossentropy --epochs 2 --batch_size 200
